verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How good it is to give thanks unto the Lord How good it is to give thanks unto our God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O he heals the broken hearted, binding up their wounds It is good to bless his holy name.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm gonna bless his name Oh we give thanks unto our Savior, and with a heart of gratItude we give him praise; His mercy shall endure forever and I will Worship him all of my days.
